{{Quote|That was never my favorite building anyway.|[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] watching TIE Bombers destroy the Capital Tower|<ref name="Star Wars: Rogue Squadron (video game)">[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron (video game)|''Star Wars: Rogue Squadron'']]</ref>}}
The '''Coronet Capitol Tower''' was the building situated in [[Coronet City/Legends|Coronet City]] that was home to the leaders of the [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] government.
[[File:Battle_of_Corellia_RS_3.jpg|thumb|left|250px|The [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] and a [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class shuttle]] escape the destroyed Capitol Tower.]]
During the [[Battle of Corellia (1 ABY)|Battle of Corellia]] around [[0 ABY/Legends|6]] [[Standard month/Legends|months]] ABY, [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[General/Legends|General]] [[Carlist Rieekan/Legends|Carlist Rieekan]] was met inside the Tower. The [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] attacked the city to prevent [[Crix Madine/Legends|Crix Madine's]] defection, forcing the evacuation of the Tower. A [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|shuttle]] docked on top, along with the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']]. Just after the evacuation was finished, two [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE bombers]] launched their payload of [[Proton bomb/Legends|proton bombs]] on the structure, leveling it.

==Behind the scenes==
The Coronet Capitol Tower appears in the [[1998]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] [[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron (video game)|''Star Wars: Rogue Squadron'']].
